objections.objection_text: Getting over an ex requires burning every bridge and hating them.
objections.underlying_belief: Emotion is the primary driver of detachment; if I don't feel 'hake' I'm still 'attached'.
objections.underlying_fear: Being sucked back in; being weak.
objections.counter_truth_angle: Hate is just as loud an attachment as love. Real freedom is being bored by the person but grateful to God for the experience.
objections.transcript_proof_quote_redacted: You don't get over people by trying to forget them... you get over people by remembering the good things... so you're detached emotionally from them.
